info.description: Sub-pages under /experiences (Workshops, Retreats, Corporate Wellbeing, Speaking).

slug.description: URL slug. Must match the route exactly: 'workshops', 'retreats', 'corporate-wellbeing', 'speaking'.

kicker.description: Small uppercase label above the title.

kickerColour.description: Hex colour for the kicker. Default blue #7BAFDD.

eyebrow.description: Optional small uppercase text above the title (e.g. 'Experiences · For teams' on Corporate Wellbeing). Leave blank to skip.

tagline.description: Optional italic single-line tagline under the title (e.g. 'Nervous system work that actually changes how people show up.'). Leave blank to skip.

heroImage.description: Main image at the top of the page.

intro.description: Main body. Separate paragraphs with a BLANK LINE between them.

secondaryList.description: Optional. For pages with a list of cards (Corporate 'Formats' grid, Speaking 'Talks' list, etc.). One item per line. Format: 'Title|Body description'. Example: '90-minute session|A single workshop. Online or in person.'. Leave blank if not needed.

pricePence.description: Optional. Price in pence (e.g. 1500 = £15, 20000 = £200). Leave 0 for 'enquire for price' pages (Corporate Wellbeing, Speaking).

isRecurring.description: Always leave OFF for experience-page items — they are one-off purchases.

mailchimpTag.description: Tag attached on successful payment. Examples: 'Workshop Buyers'. Leave blank for non-purchasable pages.
